{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Embeddings {#sec-embeddings}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- Turning token ids into vectors the model can compute with. The
     embedding matrix as a learned lookup table, and its geometry. -->
:::

**Learning objectives.**

<!-- TODO -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## From ids to vectors

<!-- One-hot times a matrix = a row lookup. The embedding matrix
     E in R^{|V| x d_model} as free parameters. -->

## The geometry of the embedding space

<!-- What directions/distances mean; a careful, non-hyped look at
     "semantic" structure. -->

## Weight tying

<!-- Sharing input embeddings with the output (unembedding) head; why, and
     what it costs. Links to the LM head in @sec-the-transformer. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

<!-- TODO -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
